files.patch:
@@ -9,6 +9,7 @@ on:
       - scripts/generate-highlights.mjs
       - scripts/generate-indents.mjs
       - scripts/generate-folds.mjs
+      - scripts/generate-locals.mjs
       - languages/**
   workflow_dispatch:
 
@@ -37,6 +38,7 @@ jobs:
           cp languages/tql/injections.scm "${{ runner.temp }}/languages/tql/injections.scm"
           cp languages/tql/indents.scm "${{ runner.temp }}/languages/tql/indents.scm"
           cp languages/tql/folds.scm "${{ runner.temp }}/languages/tql/folds.scm"
+          cp languages/tql/locals.scm "${{ runner.temp }}/languages/tql/locals.scm"
 
       - name: Capture current commit hash
         id: repo_meta
@@ -63,6 +65,7 @@ jobs:
           INJECTIONS_PATH: ${{ runner.temp }}/languages/tql/injections.scm
           INDENTS_PATH: ${{ runner.temp }}/languages/tql/indents.scm
           FOLDS_PATH: ${{ runner.temp }}/languages/tql/folds.scm
+          LOCALS_PATH: ${{ runner.temp }}/languages/tql/locals.scm
           ZED_TQL_DIR: ${{ runner.temp }}/zed-tql
         run: |
           set -euo pipefail
@@ -73,6 +76,7 @@ jobs:
           cp "$INJECTIONS_PATH" "languages/tql/injections.scm"
           cp "$INDENTS_PATH" "languages/tql/indents.scm"
           cp "$FOLDS_PATH" "languages/tql/folds.scm"
+          cp "$LOCALS_PATH" "languages/tql/locals.scm"
           sed -i "s/^commit = \".*\"/commit = \"${{ steps.repo_meta.outputs.commit }}\"/" extension.toml
           if git diff --quiet --exit-code; then
             echo "changed=false" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
@@ -101,6 +105,7 @@ jobs:
             languages/tql/injections.scm \
             languages/tql/indents.scm \
             languages/tql/folds.scm \
+            languages/tql/locals.scm \
             extension.toml
           git commit -m "Sync Tree-sitter grammar"
           git push "https://x-access-token:$TOKEN@github.com/tenzir/zed-tql.git" HEAD:main

@@ -50,6 +50,8 @@ tenzir --dump-ast '<pipeline>'
   related grammar metadata.
 - `scripts/generate-folds.mjs` emits folding queries for blocks, match
   statements, and collection literals based on `foldConstants`.
+- `scripts/generate-locals.mjs` emits locals queries for lexical bindings
+  defined in `localConstants` (currently lambda parameters).
 - The `Update Zed Extension` workflow copies all committed query artifacts into
   the downstream repository; keep the scripts and exported constants in lockstep
   with grammar changes.

@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@ Features:
 - 💬 Comments (line and block)
 - 📏 Indentation guidance for braces, pipelines, and collections via Tree-sitter indent queries
 - 🔻 Folding queries for blocks, match statements, and collection literals
+- 🧠 Lambda parameters tracked for editor tooling via locals queries
 
 # Usage
 
@@ -26,7 +27,8 @@ the Zed extensions view.
 ## Neovim
 
 Lazy.nvim example that registers the parser and filetype. Tree-sitter queries
-(highlights, indents, folds) ship in `queries/tql`, so no extra build step is
+(highlights, indents, folds, locals) ship in `queries/tql`, so no extra build
+step is
 required:
 
 <details>
@@ -112,9 +114,9 @@ Contributions are welcome! 🎉
    ```
 
 > [!NOTE]
-> Highlights, indentation, and folding queries stay in sync because they are
-> generated and committed alongside the parser. CI re-runs the generator and
-> fails if the checked-in files would change, so always execute
+> Highlights, indentation, folding, and locals queries stay in sync because
+> they are generated and committed alongside the parser. CI re-runs the
+> generator and fails if the checked-in files would change, so always execute
 > `npm run generate` after touching the grammar or related constants.
 
 ## Testing

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+;; Auto-generated by tenzir/tree-sitter-tql/scripts/generate-locals.mjs. DO NOT EDIT.
+
+(lambda_expression) @local.scope
+
+(lambda_expression
+  parameter: (identifier) @local.definition
+)

@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@
   },
   "scripts": {
     "install": "node-gyp-build",
-    "generate": "tree-sitter generate && node scripts/generate-highlights.mjs && node scripts/generate-injections.mjs && node scripts/generate-indents.mjs && node scripts/generate-folds.mjs",
+    "generate": "tree-sitter generate && node scripts/generate-highlights.mjs && node scripts/generate-injections.mjs && node scripts/generate-indents.mjs && node scripts/generate-folds.mjs && node scripts/generate-locals.mjs",
     "prestart": "tree-sitter build --wasm",
     "start": "tree-sitter playground",
     "test": "node --test bindings/node"

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+;; Auto-generated by tenzir/tree-sitter-tql/scripts/generate-locals.mjs. DO NOT EDIT.
+
+(lambda_expression) @local.scope
+
+(lambda_expression
+  parameter: (identifier) @local.definition
+)
